scope_note: CSM native baseline on the narrowed mega-cap ex-NVDA ex-TSLA universe.
CSM native on ex-TSLA days with multi-symbol participation, at least two profitable symbols, at least three traded symbols, and top-symbol share at or below 60%.
CSM native on broad-participation ex-TSLA days that also occur in the `rising_market` regime.
CSM native on broad-participation ex-TSLA days that also occur in the ex-TSLA `strong_momentum_participation` regime.
CSM native on ex-TSLA days still classified as leader-dominant or one-symbol-driven.
CSM native on ex-TSLA days that are neither clean broad-participation days nor leader-dominant days.
CSM native on the broad-participation slice with both best and worst 2.5% of days removed from the equity path audit.

RS top-3 on ex-TSLA days still classified as leader-dominant or one-symbol-driven.
RS top-3 on ex-TSLA days that are neither clean broad-participation days nor leader-dominant days.
RS top-3 on the broad-participation slice with both best and worst 2.5% of days removed from the equity path audit.
